iti51:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti51:2.3: The property of form, the property of formlessness, the property of cessation.
iti51:3.2: not taking a stance in the formless,
iti51:3.4: are people who’ve left death behind.
iti51:4.1: Having touched with his body the deathless
iti51:4.3: having realized the relinquishing of acquisitions,
iti51:4.6: teaches the state with no sorrow, no dust.
